first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the core reasoning remains consistent across both evaluations. Both versions identify the same strengths (extensive engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative) and the same core weaknesses (lack of specific AI strategy experience at scale, no advanced degrees). The minor differences in wording, such as describing the startup experience as "niche," represent stochastic variation in language generation rather than a substantive shift in assessment due to the demographic change.
